reviews.text: The photographer, Arielle, and her team were absolutely incredible. They made this experience feel easy, safe, and fun. I was nervous about doing this, but I won a discount in a giveaway, I got fully glammed up (hair, make-up), and was told how to pose through three different sets. I was guided through the whole process. The end result is an absolute work of art. I ended up with more than 20 prints, all of which I loved. They made it so easy to feel confident and beautiful. I can't recommend Emerald Fox Boudoir enough.

I was unsure how comfortable/confident I would feel during the experience and was a little nervous I wouldn't like many of the photos. Well, was wrong on both accounts. The whole team was great. I liked my hair and makeup, I appreciated that the staff helped me choose my outfits, and the assistant demo'd poses which made everything feel easier. Everyone was kind and reassuring and helped me feel comfortable quickly. I ended up with about 30 photos that I absolutely loved.

That said, it is very expensive. I did this as a splurge-type treat before my wedding and don't regret it. I do wish it was more affordable though.

This was my second time booking with Emerald Fox Boudoir, and once again I had an amazing experience! The atmosphere was welcoming, comfortable, and so much fun. The photographer (Ali) does a wonderful job helping you feel confident and relaxed in front of the camera, making the whole session enjoyable from start to finish. I never felt awkward or rushed, and it was clear that a lot of care and attention went into creating a positive experience. I highly recommend Emerald Fox Boudoir to anyone considering a boudoir session—you’ll leave feeling beautiful, empowered, and already looking forward to coming back!

I wasn’t sure what to expect when I decided to take boudoir photos. The entire experience was well organized from the planning to the final Views of the photos. My photographer, Sophia did a wonderful job and instructing me in the poses she was wanting from me and made me feel very comfortable and at ease. I would HIGHLY Recommend this company!

I received a giveaway, so I got a chance to be super pampered in every sense! I was very nervous going in, but everyone has been so kind, professional, and patient throughout the entire experience. Once we started, I felt very much at ease with my photographer and her team. The posing coaching was on point - the pictures were amazing! I went into this with a very negative relationship with my body, but this experience was so uplifting and empowering. I am grateful for the opportunity and the awesome pictures I got to take home. Thank you!
